featuredHotels.name: Inara Alas Harum
featuredHotels.tagline: A peaceful jungle retreat in the heart of Ubud
featuredHotels.description: Surrounded by tropical greenery and rice-field scenery, Inara Alas Harum offers an intimate Bali escape with elegant rooms, a beautiful pool and a calm atmosphere close to Ubud’s cultural highlights.
featuredHotels.price: Contact BENARIAN for the best available price

featuredHotels.name: Royal Tulip Springhill Resort Jimbaran
featuredHotels.tagline: A spacious tropical resort near southern Bali’s beaches
featuredHotels.description: Royal Tulip Springhill Resort Jimbaran combines spacious accommodation, landscaped gardens and resort facilities in a convenient Jimbaran location, ideal for couples, families and relaxed Bali holidays.
featuredHotels.price: Contact BENARIAN for the best available price
